positive.stdout:

7. ~? [X0] : (script_editor(X0,andrew_collins) & working_title(X0,secret_dude_society)) [negated conjecture 6]
10. ! [X0] : (~script_editor(X0,andrew_collins) | ~working_title(X0,secret_dude_society)) [ennf transformation 7]
14. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 4]
15. script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [cnf transformation 5]
16. ~script_editor(X0,andrew_collins) | ~working_title(X0,secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 10]
17. ~working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [resolution 15,16]
18. $false [forward subsumption resolution 17,14]

% Termination reason: Refutation
